questions.stem:
—Why are you so worried?
—Because I ______ my keys. I ______ them in my office yesterday.
questions.explanation: 选A。第一空强调过去的动作对现在造成的影响（现在钥匙丢了，所以担心），用现在完成时have lost；第二空有明确时间状语yesterday，用一般过去时left。解题技巧：看时间标志词，yesterday/ago用过去时，强调对现在的影响用现在完成时。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The book ______ cover is red belongs to my sister.
questions.explanation: 选C。先行词是the book，从句中cover（封面）与book是所属关系，表示'书的封面'，所以用whose作定语。who指人作主语/宾语；which/that指物作主语/宾语；whose既可指人也可指物，在从句中作定语表示所属。口诀：'谁的'就用whose。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: The problem ______ at the meeting tomorrow. Everyone should be prepared.
questions.explanation: 选B。主语the problem（问题）与动词discuss（讨论）是被动关系，问题被讨论，所以用被动语态。时间状语tomorrow表明用一般将来时，一般将来时的被动结构是will be + 过去分词。A是主动语态；C是现在进行时主动；D是一般现在时主动。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem:
—______ you ______ the film yet?
—Yes, I ______ it with my parents last weekend.
questions.explanation: 选B。第一空：yet是现在完成时的标志词，表示'已经'，用于疑问句和否定句，结构为Have/Has + 主语 + 过去分词；第二空：last weekend是明确的过去时间状语，用一般过去时saw。易错点：很多同学看到'看电影'这个动作完成了，第二空也误用完成时，但要注意ago/yesterday/last week等明确过去时间必须用一般过去时。
questions.label: 语法题

questions.stem: We should take action to ______ the environment for our future generations.
questions.explanation: 选B。根据句意'为了我们的后代，我们应该采取行动______环境'，应该是'保护'环境。protect保护；pollute污染；destroy破坏；damage损坏。A、C、D都是负面含义，与语境不符。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: The ______ news made everyone ______. We all felt excited.
questions.explanation: 选D。第一空修饰名词news，用形容词happy；第二空考查make sb. + 形容词（使某人...），用happy。unhappy（不开心的）与后文excited矛盾。副词happily不能修饰名词也不能作make的宾补。技巧：make/keep/find + sb. + adj. 结构中必须用形容词。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.stem: It's ______ for us to finish the work in two hours. We need at least four hours.
questions.explanation: 选B。根据后文'我们需要至少四小时'，可知两小时内完成是'不可能的'。impossible（形容词）不可能的；possible可能的；possibly（副词）可能地；impossibly（副词）不可能地。句型It's + adj. + for sb. to do sth. 中必须用形容词，排除C、D。根据语境选B。
questions.label: 词汇题

questions.explanation: 选A。固定搭配do a survey（做调查）。make制作；take拿走；give给。完形填空中要注意动词与名词的固定搭配。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our class had a science project about environmental protection. Everyone was excited because we could work in groups and choose our own topics. My group decided to (8)______ a survey about plastic waste in our school.

We started by (9)______ some questions for the survey. It was not easy because we needed to make sure the questions were clear and easy to understand. After that, we spent three days (10)______ out the questionnaires to students in different grades.

When we collected all the data, we were surprised. Over 60% of students used plastic bottles every day, but only 20% of them would (11)______ these bottles for other uses. Most students just threw them away. This result made us think deeply about our daily habits.

Finally, we made a poster to show our findings and gave a presentation in class. Our teacher was very (12)______ with our work. She said we had done a meaningful job. Through this project, we not only learned about science but also realized the importance of protecting our environment.

questions.explanation: 选A。根据上下文，做调查首先要'写'问题。write写；find找到；read读；answer回答。by是介词，后接动名词形式。从逻辑上看，设计调查问卷需要先编写问题。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our class had a science project about environmental protection. Everyone was excited because we could work in groups and choose our own topics. My group decided to (8)______ a survey about plastic waste in our school.

We started by (9)______ some questions for the survey. It was not easy because we needed to make sure the questions were clear and easy to understand. After that, we spent three days (10)______ out the questionnaires to students in different grades.

When we collected all the data, we were surprised. Over 60% of students used plastic bottles every day, but only 20% of them would (11)______ these bottles for other uses. Most students just threw them away. This result made us think deeply about our daily habits.

Finally, we made a poster to show our findings and gave a presentation in class. Our teacher was very (12)______ with our work. She said we had done a meaningful job. Through this project, we not only learned about science but also realized the importance of protecting our environment.

questions.explanation: 选B。固定搭配hand out（分发）。give out也有分发意思，但hand out更常用于分发传单、问卷等；take out拿出；put out扑灭。根据宾语questionnaires（问卷），选handing最恰当。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our class had a science project about environmental protection. Everyone was excited because we could work in groups and choose our own topics. My group decided to (8)______ a survey about plastic waste in our school.

We started by (9)______ some questions for the survey. It was not easy because we needed to make sure the questions were clear and easy to understand. After that, we spent three days (10)______ out the questionnaires to students in different grades.

When we collected all the data, we were surprised. Over 60% of students used plastic bottles every day, but only 20% of them would (11)______ these bottles for other uses. Most students just threw them away. This result made us think deeply about our daily habits.

Finally, we made a poster to show our findings and gave a presentation in class. Our teacher was very (12)______ with our work. She said we had done a meaningful job. Through this project, we not only learned about science but also realized the importance of protecting our environment.

questions.explanation: 选A。根据上下文'只有20%的学生会______这些瓶子做其他用途'，reuse（重新使用）符合语境，指将瓶子用于其他用途。reduce减少；recycle回收（通常指送到回收站）；repair修理。后文提到'大多数学生直接扔掉'，与之对比的是'重新使用'。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our class had a science project about environmental protection. Everyone was excited because we could work in groups and choose our own topics. My group decided to (8)______ a survey about plastic waste in our school.

We started by (9)______ some questions for the survey. It was not easy because we needed to make sure the questions were clear and easy to understand. After that, we spent three days (10)______ out the questionnaires to students in different grades.

When we collected all the data, we were surprised. Over 60% of students used plastic bottles every day, but only 20% of them would (11)______ these bottles for other uses. Most students just threw them away. This result made us think deeply about our daily habits.

Finally, we made a poster to show our findings and gave a presentation in class. Our teacher was very (12)______ with our work. She said we had done a meaningful job. Through this project, we not only learned about science but also realized the importance of protecting our environment.

questions.explanation: 选B。固定搭配be pleased with（对...满意）。根据后文'她说我们做了有意义的工作'，可知老师很'满意'。angry生气的；sad伤心的；worried担心的，均与语境不符。
questions.label: 完形填空
questions.group_passage:
Last month, our class had a science project about environmental protection. Everyone was excited because we could work in groups and choose our own topics. My group decided to (8)______ a survey about plastic waste in our school.

We started by (9)______ some questions for the survey. It was not easy because we needed to make sure the questions were clear and easy to understand. After that, we spent three days (10)______ out the questionnaires to students in different grades.

When we collected all the data, we were surprised. Over 60% of students used plastic bottles every day, but only 20% of them would (11)______ these bottles for other uses. Most students just threw them away. This result made us think deeply about our daily habits.

Finally, we made a poster to show our findings and gave a presentation in class. Our teacher was very (12)______ with our work. She said we had done a meaningful job. Through this project, we not only learned about science but also realized the importance of protecting our environment.

questions.stem: Where have the scientists sent the special books according to the passage?
questions.explanation: 选B。细节理解题。根据文章第三段第一句'The team has already sent hundreds of these books to Africa and Asia.'可知，这些书被送往了非洲和亚洲。细节题要准确定位原文，找到关键句。
questions.label: 阅读-细节理解
questions.group_passage:
Clean water is important for everyone, but in some poor areas, people still don't have enough clean water to drink. Recently, a group of young scientists from Australia have invented a special book that can turn dirty water into clean water.

Each page of this book is a special filter (过滤器). When dirty water passes through the page, 99% of the bacteria (细菌) will be killed. The book not only provides safe drinking water but also teaches people about sanitation (卫生) and health.

Dr. Smith, the lead researcher, explained how it works. "The pages are coated with silver nanoparticles (纳米颗粒)," he said. "These particles can kill bacteria effectively. One book can provide clean water for one person for about four years."

The team has already sent hundreds of these books to Africa and Asia. Local people are happy to use them. "Before we had this book, many children got sick because of dirty water," said a village leader in Kenya. "Now the situation has improved a lot."

However, the scientists say this is just the first step. They are working hard to make the books cheaper so that more people can afford them. They hope that one day, everyone in the world will have access to clean water.

questions.stem: What can we infer from the last paragraph?
options: A. The book is quite expensive now.
B. The scientists have stopped their research.
C. People in Kenya don't like the book.
D. Silver nanoparticles are harmful to humans.
questions.explanation: 选A。推理判断题。最后一段提到'他们正在努力使书更便宜（make the books cheaper）'，可推断出现在书比较贵。B项与原文'这只是第一步'矛盾；C项与'当地人乐于使用'矛盾；D项文中未提及且与'提供安全饮用水'矛盾。推理题要基于原文信息，不能主观臆断。
questions.label: 阅读-推理判断
questions.group_passage:
Clean water is important for everyone, but in some poor areas, people still don't have enough clean water to drink. Recently, a group of young scientists from Australia have invented a special book that can turn dirty water into clean water.

Each page of this book is a special filter (过滤器). When dirty water passes through the page, 99% of the bacteria (细菌) will be killed. The book not only provides safe drinking water but also teaches people about sanitation (卫生) and health.

Dr. Smith, the lead researcher, explained how it works. "The pages are coated with silver nanoparticles (纳米颗粒)," he said. "These particles can kill bacteria effectively. One book can provide clean water for one person for about four years."

The team has already sent hundreds of these books to Africa and Asia. Local people are happy to use them. "Before we had this book, many children got sick because of dirty water," said a village leader in Kenya. "Now the situation has improved a lot."

However, the scientists say this is just the first step. They are working hard to make the books cheaper so that more people can afford them. They hope that one day, everyone in the world will have access to clean water.

questions.stem: The underlined word "afford" in the last paragraph probably means ______.
questions.explanation: 选B。词义猜测题。根据上下文'他们正努力使书更便宜，以便更多人能afford它们'，可猜测afford意为'负担得起'。前文的cheaper（更便宜）是重要线索。词义猜测题要注意前后文的因果、转折、递进等逻辑关系。
questions.label: 阅读-词义猜测
questions.group_passage:
Clean water is important for everyone, but in some poor areas, people still don't have enough clean water to drink. Recently, a group of young scientists from Australia have invented a special book that can turn dirty water into clean water.

Each page of this book is a special filter (过滤器). When dirty water passes through the page, 99% of the bacteria (细菌) will be killed. The book not only provides safe drinking water but also teaches people about sanitation (卫生) and health.

Dr. Smith, the lead researcher, explained how it works. "The pages are coated with silver nanoparticles (纳米颗粒)," he said. "These particles can kill bacteria effectively. One book can provide clean water for one person for about four years."

The team has already sent hundreds of these books to Africa and Asia. Local people are happy to use them. "Before we had this book, many children got sick because of dirty water," said a village leader in Kenya. "Now the situation has improved a lot."

However, the scientists say this is just the first step. They are working hard to make the books cheaper so that more people can afford them. They hope that one day, everyone in the world will have access to clean water.

questions.stem: What is the best title for this passage?
options: A. The Importance of Clean Water
B. How to Kill Bacteria in Water
C. A Special Book for Clean Water
questions.explanation: 选C。主旨大意题。文章主要介绍了一种能将脏水变干净的书，包括其原理、使用效果和未来发展。A项只提到水的重要性，是背景信息；B项只涉及杀菌，是细节；D项范围太广。主旨题要抓住文章核心话题，通常是高频出现的名词或概念。
questions.label: 阅读-主旨大意
questions.group_passage:
Clean water is important for everyone, but in some poor areas, people still don't have enough clean water to drink. Recently, a group of young scientists from Australia have invented a special book that can turn dirty water into clean water.

Each page of this book is a special filter (过滤器). When dirty water passes through the page, 99% of the bacteria (细菌) will be killed. The book not only provides safe drinking water but also teaches people about sanitation (卫生) and health.

Dr. Smith, the lead researcher, explained how it works. "The pages are coated with silver nanoparticles (纳米颗粒)," he said. "These particles can kill bacteria effectively. One book can provide clean water for one person for about four years."

The team has already sent hundreds of these books to Africa and Asia. Local people are happy to use them. "Before we had this book, many children got sick because of dirty water," said a village leader in Kenya. "Now the situation has improved a lot."

However, the scientists say this is just the first step. They are working hard to make the books cheaper so that more people can afford them. They hope that one day, everyone in the world will have access to clean water.

options: A. However, many students don't have enough time to sleep.
B. In addition, keep a good mood.
C. Try to avoid eating too much sugar and fat.
D. As a result, you will have more energy to study.
E. It helps you stay active and strong.
questions.explanation: 选C。前文讲'均衡饮食'，后文说'应该多吃蔬菜水果而不是垃圾食品'，因此此处应填与饮食相关的句子。C项'尽量避免吃太多糖和脂肪'承上启下，符合逻辑。选句填空要注意上下文的主题一致性。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
It's important for us to keep healthy. Here are some useful tips for you.

First, eat a balanced diet. (17)______ You should eat more vegetables and fruit instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day.

Second, exercise regularly. (18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise. Walking, swimming, or playing basketball for 30 minutes every day is enough.

Third, get enough sleep. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. (19)______ If you stay up late often, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

(20)______ Try to smile every day and stay positive when facing difficulties. Good mental health is also part of a healthy lifestyle.

options: A. However, many students don't have enough time to sleep.
B. In addition, keep a good mood.
C. Try to avoid eating too much sugar and fat.
D. As a result, you will have more energy to study.
E. It helps you stay active and strong.
questions.explanation: 选E。本段主题是'exercise regularly（定期锻炼）'，E项'它帮助你保持活跃和强壮'中的It指代exercise，解释了锻炼的好处，与后文'你不需要做剧烈运动'衔接自然。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
It's important for us to keep healthy. Here are some useful tips for you.

First, eat a balanced diet. (17)______ You should eat more vegetables and fruit instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day.

Second, exercise regularly. (18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise. Walking, swimming, or playing basketball for 30 minutes every day is enough.

Third, get enough sleep. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. (19)______ If you stay up late often, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

(20)______ Try to smile every day and stay positive when facing difficulties. Good mental health is also part of a healthy lifestyle.

options: A. However, many students don't have enough time to sleep.
B. In addition, keep a good mood.
C. Try to avoid eating too much sugar and fat.
D. As a result, you will have more energy to study.
E. It helps you stay active and strong.
questions.explanation: 选A。前文说'青少年每晚需要至少8小时睡眠'，后文说'如果你经常熬夜，你会感到疲惫'，A项'然而，许多学生没有足够的睡眠时间'起到转折过渡作用，However表示转折，引出睡眠不足的问题。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
It's important for us to keep healthy. Here are some useful tips for you.

First, eat a balanced diet. (17)______ You should eat more vegetables and fruit instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day.

Second, exercise regularly. (18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise. Walking, swimming, or playing basketball for 30 minutes every day is enough.

Third, get enough sleep. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. (19)______ If you stay up late often, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

(20)______ Try to smile every day and stay positive when facing difficulties. Good mental health is also part of a healthy lifestyle.

options: A. However, many students don't have enough time to sleep.
B. In addition, keep a good mood.
C. Try to avoid eating too much sugar and fat.
D. As a result, you will have more energy to study.
E. It helps you stay active and strong.
questions.explanation: 选B。前文讲了饮食、运动、睡眠三个方面，本段讲的是'smile every day and stay positive（保持积极）'，即心理健康。B项'In addition, keep a good mood（此外，保持好心情）'作为段落主题句，引出心理健康的内容。In addition表示递进，补充新的建议。
questions.label: 短文填空
questions.group_passage:
It's important for us to keep healthy. Here are some useful tips for you.

First, eat a balanced diet. (17)______ You should eat more vegetables and fruit instead of junk food. Remember that breakfast is the most important meal of the day.

Second, exercise regularly. (18)______ You don't need to do intense exercise. Walking, swimming, or playing basketball for 30 minutes every day is enough.

Third, get enough sleep. Teenagers need at least 8 hours of sleep every night. (19)______ If you stay up late often, you will feel tired and can't concentrate in class.

(20)______ Try to smile every day and stay positive when facing difficulties. Good mental health is also part of a healthy lifestyle.
